full_text:
Ji Zhi (Zishang) 紀陟 (子上)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Zhi (紀陟), styledZishang (子上). Sent to Wei as an envoy, and to spy on them. Ji Zhi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
